items.title: Man killed by 13ft great white shark in Western Australia
items.dek: The man was bitten just before 10:00 (03:00 BST) at Horseshoe Reef - north-west of the popular Rottnest Island near the city of Perth, local police said.
items.body: The man was bitten just before 10:00 (03:00 BST) at Horseshoe Reef - north-west of the popular Rottnest Island near the city of Perth, local police said.
items.author: IriLine Desk

items.title: Trump says senior IS leader killed by US and Nigerian forces
items.dek: The US president says the joint operation eliminated "the most active terrorist in the world", Abu-Bilal al-Minuki.
items.body: The US president says the joint operation eliminated "the most active terrorist in the world", Abu-Bilal al-Minuki.
items.author: IriLine Desk

items.title: US planning to criminally indict ex-Cuban leader Raúl Castro
items.dek: Charges could come as soon as next week in a case reportedly focused on Cuba's downing of two planes in 1996.
items.body: Charges could come as soon as next week in a case reportedly focused on Cuba's downing of two planes in 1996.
items.author: IriLine Desk
